defects.summary: Fetching all pharmacy operations queue summaries refreshed the same projection rows concurrently and could trip compare-and-set version checks.

remediations.summary: Changed fetchQueueCountsAndAgeingSummaries to gather each worklist sequentially so repository-owned projection refreshes preserve CAS ordering.

boundedExternalBoundaries.summary: Local proof verifies monitored safety-net posture and redaction. It does not claim live mailbox approval or practice operational sign-off.
Local proof keeps Update Record separate from urgent-return communication. It does not claim live GP Connect supplier certification.
